article_summary: The provided document is a table of contents and cover note rather than the full article text. Its green-relevant content states that hydropower and other renewable energy sources may help meet growing global energy demand and mitigate climate change, but that the biodiversity impacts of these supposedly green energy technologies are often overlooked. For a green smart-home RAG knowledge base, the document only weakly supports environmental awareness: it suggests that greener automation should be evaluated critically rather than assuming that any energy-related or renewable option is automatically sustainable.
